feed.title: cpprefjp - C++日本語リファレンス

entry.title: replace -- カンマの抜けを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/ranges_replace.md b/reference/algorithm/ranges_replace.md
index 26bc41e47..f2b2dbadc 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/ranges_replace.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/ranges_replace.md
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ namespace std::ranges {
             class Proj = identity>
     requires indirectly_writable<I, const T2&> &&
              indirect_binary_predicate<
-               ranges::equal_to
+               ranges::equal_to,
                projected<I, Proj>,
                const T1*
              >
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ namespace std::ranges {
             class T2 = T1>
     requires indirectly_writable<I, const T2&> &&
              indirect_binary_predicate<
-               ranges::equal_to
+               ranges::equal_to,
                projected<I, Proj>,
                const T1*
              >

entry.title: swap (非メンバ関数) -- indirect / polymorphic : Hidden friends 版 swap のページタイトルを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md b/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md
index b27d9b409..8a3bc6b9d 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# swap
+# swap (非メンバ関数)
 * memory[meta header]
 * std[meta namespace]
 * indirect[meta class]

entry.title: swap (非メンバ関数) -- indirect / polymorphic : Hidden friends 版 swap のページタイトルを修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md
index dc0ad3660..24c9c3763 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# swap
+# swap (非メンバ関数)
 * memory[meta header]
 * std[meta namespace]
 * polymorphic[meta class]

entry.title: hash -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md b/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md
index 35dd5c788..40db3d828 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md
@@ -39,8 +39,9 @@ int main()
   assert((std::hash<std::indirect<int>>{}(a) == std::hash<int>{}(42)));
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
-* std::hash[link /reference/functional/hash.md]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
+* std::hash<int>[link /reference/functional/hash.md]
+* std::hash[color ff0000]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: operator-> -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_arrow.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_arrow.md
index a04a30351..48bcae968 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_arrow.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_arrow.md
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ int main()
   assert(*s == "hello!");
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: operator= -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md
index c3c423d70..ea00022e1 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ int main()
   assert(b.valueless_after_move());
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
 * std::move[link /reference/utility/move.md]
 * valueless_after_move[link valueless_after_move.md]

entry.title: operator<=> -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_compare_3way.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_compare_3way.md
index 021ff8c0d..db6ba2aad 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_compare_3way.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_compare_3way.md
@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ int main()
   assert(a < 2);          // (2) 値との比較
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: コンストラクタ -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_constructor.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_constructor.md
index 756c50dc8..d67cf1030 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_constructor.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_constructor.md
@@ -130,7 +130,7 @@ int main()
   assert(d.valueless_after_move());               // ムーブ後は無効値状態
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
 * std::in_place[link /reference/utility/in_place_t.md]
 
 ### 出力

entry.title: 推論補助 -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_deduction_guide.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_deduction_guide.md
index e1544a47b..15ed65da2 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_deduction_guide.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_deduction_guide.md
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ int main()
   static_assert(std::is_same_v<decltype(a), std::indirect<int>>);
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: operator* -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_deref.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_deref.md
index ef08fcf8a..ab9abe9a7 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_deref.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_deref.md
@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ int main()
   static_assert(std::is_same_v<decltype(*b), const int&>);
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: operator== -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_equal.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_equal.md
index 91417707f..9deb28c6b 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_equal.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_equal.md
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ int main()
   assert(a != 0);
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: swap -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/swap.md b/reference/memory/indirect/swap.md
index f48250199..9e23a5786 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/swap.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/swap.md
@@ -44,7 +44,8 @@ int main()
   assert(*a == 2 && *b == 1);
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
+* swap[color ff0000]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: swap -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md b/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md
index b85df0bd7..b27d9b409 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/swap_free.md
@@ -38,7 +38,8 @@ int main()
   assert(*a == 2 && *b == 1);
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
+* swap[color ff0000]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: valueless_after_move -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/valueless_after_move.md b/reference/memory/indirect/valueless_after_move.md
index 161ce3f16..0c9129cac 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/valueless_after_move.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/valueless_after_move.md
@@ -37,7 +37,8 @@ int main()
   assert(!b.valueless_after_move());
 }
 ```
-* std::indirect[color ff0000]
+* std::indirect[link ../indirect.md]
+* valueless_after_move[color ff0000]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: operator-> -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_arrow.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_arrow.md
index fad8e5e62..e166ca889 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_arrow.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_arrow.md
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ int main()
   assert(a->f() == 42);  // 基底型Baseのメンバへアクセス（仮想ディスパッチ）
 }
 ```
-* std::polymorphic[color ff0000]
+* std::polymorphic[link ../polymorphic.md]
 * std::in_place_type[link /reference/utility/in_place_type_t.md]
 
 ### 出力

entry.title: operator= -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md
index ed996f761..b3a4d7f12 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md
@@ -68,7 +68,7 @@ int main()
   assert(a->f() == 2);
 }
 ```
-* std::polymorphic[color ff0000]
+* std::polymorphic[link ../polymorphic.md]
 * std::in_place_type[link /reference/utility/in_place_type_t.md]
 
 ### 出力

entry.title: コンストラクタ -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_constructor.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_constructor.md
index 4a0e01af7..0997e5d8a 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_constructor.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_constructor.md
@@ -132,7 +132,7 @@ int main()
   assert(c->f() == 42);
 }
 ```
-* std::polymorphic[color ff0000]
+* std::polymorphic[link ../polymorphic.md]
 * std::in_place_type[link /reference/utility/in_place_type_t.md]
 
 ### 出力

entry.title: operator* -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_deref.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_deref.md
index bfc03fe52..197474389 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_deref.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_deref.md
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ int main()
   assert(r.f() == 42);   // 仮想関数で派生型Derivedの実装が呼ばれる
 }
 ```
-* std::polymorphic[color ff0000]
+* std::polymorphic[link ../polymorphic.md]
 * std::in_place_type[link /reference/utility/in_place_type_t.md]
 
 ### 出力

entry.title: swap -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap.md
index 695d15cce..98c231e53 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap.md
@@ -48,8 +48,9 @@ int main()
   assert(a->f() == 2 && b->f() == 1);
 }
 ```
-* std::polymorphic[color ff0000]
+* std::polymorphic[link ../polymorphic.md]
 * std::in_place_type[link /reference/utility/in_place_type_t.md]
+* swap[color ff0000]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: swap -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md
index f680893d8..dc0ad3660 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/swap_free.md
@@ -42,8 +42,9 @@ int main()
   assert(a->f() == 2 && b->f() == 1);
 }
 ```
-* std::polymorphic[color ff0000]
+* std::polymorphic[link ../polymorphic.md]
 * std::in_place_type[link /reference/utility/in_place_type_t.md]
+* swap[color ff0000]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: valueless_after_move -- indirect / polymorphic : コード修飾を修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/valueless_after_move.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/valueless_after_move.md
index c309873a6..c095c3552 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/valueless_after_move.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/valueless_after_move.md
@@ -47,8 +47,9 @@ int main()
   assert(a.valueless_after_move());  // ムーブ後は無効値状態
 }
 ```
-* std::polymorphic[color ff0000]
+* std::polymorphic[link ../polymorphic.md]
 * std::in_place_type[link /reference/utility/in_place_type_t.md]
+* valueless_after_move[color ff0000]
 
 ### 出力
 ```

entry.title: hash -- hash<indirect> : meta class を削除
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md b/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md
index 6aa893188..35dd5c788 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/hash.md
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
 # hash
 * memory[meta header]
 * std[meta namespace]
-* indirect[meta class]
 * class template[meta id-type]
 * cpp26[meta cpp]

entry.title: operator= -- ページタイトル「代入演算子」を「operator=」に修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md b/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md
index 96b94e8ec..c3c423d70 100644
--- a/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md
+++ b/reference/memory/indirect/op_assign.md
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# 代入演算子
+# operator=
 * memory[meta header]
 * std[meta namespace]
 * indirect[meta class]

entry.title: operator= -- ページタイトル「代入演算子」を「operator=」に修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md
index 03b7d8c1c..ed996f761 100644
--- a/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md
+++ b/reference/memory/polymorphic/op_assign.md
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# 代入演算子
+# operator=
 * memory[meta header]
 * std[meta namespace]
 * polymorphic[meta class]
